WITH


source_data AS (
    SELECT

    
        bestellungid,
        kundeid,
        vereinspartnerid,
        kaufdatum,
        kreditkarte,
        gueltigbis,
        kkfirma,
        produktid,
        menge,
        preis,
        rabatt,
        ldts

  FROM "postgres"."dv"."base_roadshow_rsbestellung"

  ),





ldts_rsrc_data AS (

  SELECT
    CAST( ldts as TIMESTAMPTZ ) AS ldts,
    CAST( 'ROADSHOW' as VARCHAR ) AS rsrc,
      
        bestellungid,
        kundeid,
        vereinspartnerid,
        kaufdatum,
        kreditkarte,
        gueltigbis,
        kkfirma,
        produktid,
        menge,
        preis,
        rabatt
    

  FROM source_data),




hashed_columns AS (

    SELECT

    
        ldts,
        rsrc,
        bestellungid,
        kundeid,
        vereinspartnerid,
        kaufdatum,
        kreditkarte,
        gueltigbis,
        kkfirma,
        produktid,
        menge,
        preis,
        rabatt,
    COALESCE(LOWER(MD5(NULLIF(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CONCAT(
        COALESCE((

            '"' || REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM CAST(bestellungid AS VARCHAR)), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--') || '"'

        ), '^^')
        ), '\n', '') 
        , '\t', '') 
        , '\v', '') 
        , '\r', '') AS VARCHAR), '^^'))), '00000000000000000000000000000000') AS hk_bestellung_h,
    COALESCE(LOWER(MD5(NULLIF(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CONCAT(
        COALESCE((

            '"' || REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM CAST(produktid AS VARCHAR)), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--') || '"'

        ), '^^')
        ), '\n', '') 
        , '\t', '') 
        , '\v', '') 
        , '\r', '') AS VARCHAR), '^^'))), '00000000000000000000000000000000') AS hk_produkt_h,
    COALESCE(LOWER(MD5(NULLIF(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CONCAT(
        COALESCE((

            '"' || REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM CAST(kundeid AS VARCHAR)), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--') || '"'

        ), '^^')
        ), '\n', '') 
        , '\t', '') 
        , '\v', '') 
        , '\r', '') AS VARCHAR), '^^'))), '00000000000000000000000000000000') AS hk_kunde_h,
    COALESCE(LOWER(MD5(NULLIF(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CONCAT(
        COALESCE((

            '"' || REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM CAST(vereinspartnerid AS VARCHAR)), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--') || '"'

        ), '^^')
        ), '\n', '') 
        , '\t', '') 
        , '\v', '') 
        , '\r', '') AS VARCHAR), '^^'))), '00000000000000000000000000000000') AS hk_vereinspartner_h,
    COALESCE(LOWER(MD5(NULLIF(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CONCAT(
        COALESCE((

            '"' || REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM CAST(bestellungid AS VARCHAR)), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--') || '"'

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((

            '"' || REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM CAST(produktid AS VARCHAR)), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--') || '"'

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((

            '"' || REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM CAST(kundeid AS VARCHAR)), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--') || '"'

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((

            '"' || REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM CAST(vereinspartnerid AS VARCHAR)), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--') || '"'

        ), '^^')
        ), '\n', '') 
        , '\t', '') 
        , '\v', '') 
        , '\r', '') AS VARCHAR), '^^||^^||^^||^^'))), '00000000000000000000000000000000') AS hk_rsbestellung_l,
    COALESCE(LOWER(MD5(NULLIF(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CONCAT(
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(kaufdatum AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(kreditkarte AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(gueltigbis AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(kkfirma AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(menge AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(preis AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(rabatt AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^')
        ), '\n', '') 
        , '\t', '') 
        , '\v', '') 
        , '\r', '') AS VARCHAR), '^^||^^||^^||^^||^^||^^||^^'))), '00000000000000000000000000000000') AS hd_rsbestellung_s

    FROM ldts_rsrc_data
  
),

unknown_values AS (

    SELECT

    CAST(TO_TIMESTAMP('0001-01-01 00:00:01', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TIMESTAMPTZ) as ldts
    ,'SYSTEM' as rsrc
        , '(unknown)' as bestellungid
        , '(unknown)' as kundeid
        , '(unknown)' as vereinspartnerid
        ,TO_DATE('0001-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) as kaufdatum
        , '(unknown)' as kreditkarte
        , '(unknown)' as gueltigbis
        , '(unknown)' as kkfirma
        , CAST(-1 as INTEGER) as produktid
        , CAST(-1 as INTEGER) as menge
        , CAST(-1 as NUMERIC) as preis
        , CAST(-1 as NUMERIC) as rabatt
        ,CAST('00000000000000000000000000000000' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_bestellung_h
        ,CAST('00000000000000000000000000000000' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_produkt_h
        ,CAST('00000000000000000000000000000000' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_kunde_h
        ,CAST('00000000000000000000000000000000' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_vereinspartner_h
        ,CAST('00000000000000000000000000000000' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_rsbestellung_l
        ,CAST('00000000000000000000000000000000' as VARCHAR(32)) as hd_rsbestellung_s
),


error_values AS (

    SELECT

    CAST(TO_TIMESTAMP('8888-12-31 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TIMESTAMPTZ) as ldts
    ,'ERROR' as rsrc
        , '(error)' as bestellungid
        , '(error)' as kundeid
        , '(error)' as vereinspartnerid
        ,TO_DATE('8888-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) as kaufdatum
        , '(error)' as kreditkarte
        , '(error)' as gueltigbis
        , '(error)' as kkfirma
        , CAST(-2 as INTEGER) as produktid
        , CAST(-2 as INTEGER) as menge
        , CAST(-2 as NUMERIC) as preis
        , CAST(-2 as NUMERIC) as rabatt
        ,CAST('ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_bestellung_h
        ,CAST('ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_produkt_h
        ,CAST('ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_kunde_h
        ,CAST('ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_vereinspartner_h
        ,CAST('ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_rsbestellung_l
        ,CAST('ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff' as VARCHAR(32)) as hd_rsbestellung_s
),


ghost_records AS (
    SELECT * FROM unknown_values
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM error_values
),
columns_to_select AS (

    SELECT

    
        ldts,
        rsrc,
        bestellungid,
        kundeid,
        vereinspartnerid,
        kaufdatum,
        kreditkarte,
        gueltigbis,
        kkfirma,
        produktid,
        menge,
        preis,
        rabatt,
        hk_bestellung_h,
        hk_produkt_h,
        hk_kunde_h,
        hk_vereinspartner_h,
        hk_rsbestellung_l,
        hd_rsbestellung_s

    FROM hashed_columns
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT

    
        ldts,
        rsrc,
        bestellungid,
        kundeid,
        vereinspartnerid,
        kaufdatum,
        kreditkarte,
        gueltigbis,
        kkfirma,
        produktid,
        menge,
        preis,
        rabatt,
        hk_bestellung_h,
        hk_produkt_h,
        hk_kunde_h,
        hk_vereinspartner_h,
        hk_rsbestellung_l,
        hd_rsbestellung_s

    FROM ghost_records

)

SELECT * FROM columns_to_select
